fa-sort-up-down.appearanceId: an upward-pointing triangle or caret stacked directly above a downward-pointing triangle or caret, forming a bidirectional sort indicator; two opposing arrowheads arranged vertically tip-to-tip
fa-sort-up-down.functionalityId: toggles or indicates a bidirectional sort order for a column or list; switches between ascending and descending sort modes
fa-sort-up-down.intentId: sort a list or table column in either ascending or descending order; indicate that a field supports bidirectional sorting

fa-soup.appearanceId: a wide shallow bowl silhouette filled with liquid and a spoon resting across the rim or inside; round soup bowl outline with a ladle or spoon handle
fa-soup.functionalityId: represents a soup dish or hot liquid food item in a menu or recipe context; indicates a soup course or warm food category
fa-soup.intentId: select or display a soup dish in a food ordering or recipe application; indicate a hot liquid meal or soup course

fa-spa.appearanceId: a stylized flower or lotus blossom silhouette with rounded petals radiating from a central point, suggesting a spa or wellness motif; open petal flower outline with a soft organic shape
fa-spa.functionalityId: represents a spa, wellness center, or relaxation service; indicates beauty treatments, massage, or holistic health options
fa-spa.intentId: find or indicate a spa or wellness facility; access relaxation or beauty treatment services in a travel or health application

fa-space-station-moon.appearanceId: a crescent moon shape combined with a circular space station ring or docking structure, suggesting an orbital facility near the moon; crescent moon outline with an attached or overlapping ring station
fa-space-station-moon.functionalityId: represents a lunar space station or moon-orbiting facility; indicates a space base, orbital installation, or science-fiction station theme
fa-space-station-moon.intentId: indicate a lunar or moon-orbiting space station; represent a space base or orbital facility in a science-fiction or space exploration interface

fa-space-station-moon-alt.appearanceId: an alternative view of a crescent moon combined with a circular space station ring structure, with a slightly different arrangement or orientation of the ring and moon elements; alternate crescent moon with ring station layout
fa-space-station-moon-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative depiction of a lunar space station or moon-orbiting facility; indicates a space base or orbital structure variant
fa-space-station-moon-alt.intentId: indicate an alternate design of a lunar space station; represent a sci-fi orbital facility with a different visual orientation in a space-themed interface

fa-spade.appearanceId: a classic playing card spade suit symbol with an inverted heart-shaped top lobes, a pointed bottom tip, and a short stem with a small base; spade suit glyph with a two-lobe head and stem
fa-spade.functionalityId: represents the spades suit symbol in a card game or gambling context; indicates a spade category, filter, or suit selection
fa-spade.intentId: identify or select the spades suit in a card game or casino interface; indicate a spade-suited category in a playing card application

fa-sparkle.appearanceId: a single four-pointed star or starburst shape with elongated narrow diamond points radiating from the center; lone sparkle glyph with four tapering spike rays
fa-sparkle.functionalityId: indicates a highlight, new feature, or AI-generated content marker; adds a sparkle or magic emphasis to a UI element
fa-sparkle.intentId: highlight a new feature, special item, or AI-generated content; add a visual sparkle accent to draw attention in an interface

fa-sparkles.appearanceId: two or three four-pointed starburst shapes of varying sizes scattered in a cluster, each with elongated diamond spike points; small group of sparkle glyphs with multi-size four-pointed stars
fa-sparkles.functionalityId: indicates magic, AI-assistance, celebratory flair, or premium content; adds multiple sparkle accents to highlight special or enhanced elements
fa-sparkles.intentId: highlight AI features, magic effects, or celebratory moments; indicate premium or enhanced content with a multi-sparkle visual accent

fa-speaker.appearanceId: a single loudspeaker cabinet silhouette viewed from the front with a rectangular box body, a large circular driver cone in the center, and a tweeter or port detail; speaker enclosure outline with a round driver grille
fa-speaker.functionalityId: represents a single audio speaker or loudspeaker device; controls or indicates an audio output source
fa-speaker.intentId: select or control a speaker or audio output device; indicate sound playback hardware in an audio or home theater interface

fa-speakers.appearanceId: two loudspeaker cabinet silhouettes side by side, each with a rectangular box and a large circular driver cone; stereo speaker pair outline with two round driver grilles
fa-speakers.functionalityId: represents a stereo speaker pair or multi-speaker audio system; controls or indicates a stereo or surround-sound audio output configuration
fa-speakers.intentId: select or manage a stereo or multi-speaker audio setup; indicate paired audio output devices in a home theater or sound system interface

fa-spell-check.appearanceId: the letters A and B with a checkmark beneath or beside them, or a text cursor with a green checkmark overlay indicating correct spelling; ABC letters with a verification tick mark
fa-spell-check.functionalityId: activates or indicates a spell-check feature in a text editor or input field; verifies correct spelling of entered text
fa-spell-check.intentId: check and correct spelling in a document or text field; enable spell-check functionality in a writing or editing interface

fa-spider.appearanceId: a standard orb-weaver spider silhouette with a round body, eight long segmented legs spreading radially, and a smaller head segment; round-bodied arachnid outline with eight radiating legs
fa-spider.functionalityId: represents a spider or arachnid in a nature, Halloween, or pest-control context; indicates a creepy-crawly or spooky theme
fa-spider.intentId: indicate a spider or arachnid in a nature, Halloween, or pest identification interface; represent a spooky or creepy theme in a seasonal application

fa-spider-black-widow.appearanceId: a spider silhouette with a round body featuring a distinct hourglass or red-mark shape on the abdomen, and eight radiating segmented legs; black widow arachnid outline with an hourglass marking on the underbelly
fa-spider-black-widow.functionalityId: represents a black widow spider or a venomous arachnid warning; indicates a dangerous spider species or a toxin-hazard context
fa-spider-black-widow.intentId: identify or warn about a black widow spider or venomous arachnid; indicate a danger or poison hazard from a specific spider species

fa-spider-web.appearanceId: a concentric geometric spider web pattern with radial spoke lines crossing multiple circular rings, showing no spider body; circular web outline with radial spokes and concentric ring rings
fa-spider-web.functionalityId: represents a spider web structure or a network mesh pattern; indicates a trap, entanglement, or interconnected web theme
fa-spider-web.intentId: indicate a spider web, network mesh, or entanglement theme; represent a web structure in a Halloween, nature, or network visualization interface

fa-spinner.appearanceId: a full near-circle arc with a tapered or faded tail creating a circular loading ring with a small gap; complete loading ring with a graduating tail and small open segment
fa-spinner.functionalityId: indicates that content or a process is loading or in progress; animates to signal an active background operation
fa-spinner.intentId: show a loading or processing state while waiting for an action to complete; indicate that the system is working in the background

fa-spinner-scale.appearanceId: a circular loading arc similar to a spinner but with proportional scaling indicators or multiple concentric arcs of varying stroke weight; circular arc loading ring with scale-proportional arc thickness
fa-spinner-scale.functionalityId: indicates a scalable or proportional loading state; represents a loading spinner that adapts its arc to reflect progress or scale
fa-spinner-scale.intentId: show a scalable or proportionally weighted loading state; indicate background processing with a visually scaled spinner in an interface

fa-spinner-third.appearanceId: a partial circular arc covering approximately one-third of a full circle, with tapered ends suggesting rotation; short one-third arc segment forming a partial loading ring
fa-spinner-third.functionalityId: indicates a loading or processing state with a shorter partial arc spinner; animates as a minimalist loading indicator
fa-spinner-third.intentId: show a compact or lightweight loading state; indicate an active background process with a minimal partial-arc spinner

fa-split.appearanceId: a single line or arrow entering from one side and branching into two diverging lines or arrows pointing in separate directions; Y-shaped or fork split path with one input and two outputs
fa-split.functionalityId: splits a flow, path, or data stream into two separate branches; divides a single item or sequence into multiple parts
fa-split.intentId: divide a workflow, path, or data into two branches; indicate a fork or split operation in a process or routing interface

fa-splotch.appearanceId: an irregular blob or paint splatter shape with jagged or uneven edges, resembling a random ink blot or paint smear; organic irregular blob outline with rough ragged edges
fa-splotch.functionalityId: represents a paint splotch, ink splatter, or abstract color blob; indicates a painting tool, random texture, or artistic stain
fa-splotch.intentId: apply a paint splotch or ink splatter effect in a design or art tool; indicate an abstract color blob or random texture element

fa-spoon.appearanceId: a spoon silhouette with an oval bowl at one end and a long straight or slightly tapered handle; eating utensil outline with a rounded scoop head
fa-spoon.functionalityId: represents a spoon utensil in a food, kitchen, or dining context; indicates a meal, recipe ingredient measurement, or dining setting
fa-spoon.intentId: indicate a spoon in a food ordering, recipe, or kitchen interface; represent a dining utensil or measurement tool in a culinary application

fa-sportsball.appearanceId: a generic round ball silhouette with curved seam lines or panel markings suggesting a sports ball without specifying the sport; circular ball outline with curved stitch or panel detail
fa-sportsball.functionalityId: represents a generic sports ball or athletic sport activity; indicates a sports category, game, or recreational activity
fa-sportsball.intentId: indicate a sports activity or athletic category; represent a generic sports ball in a recreation, fitness, or event interface

fa-spray-can.appearanceId: an aerosol spray can silhouette with a cylindrical body, a nozzle cap on top, and small dots or a spray mist cloud emitting from the nozzle; upright aerosol can outline with a spray burst at the tip
fa-spray-can.functionalityId: represents a spray can or aerosol applicator in a painting or cleaning context; applies color, paint, or a spray effect in a design tool
fa-spray-can.intentId: apply spray paint or aerosol coating in a design or art interface; indicate a spray can tool for painting or surface treatment

fa-sprinkler.appearanceId: a ground-level sprinkler head silhouette with a small rotating nozzle body and multiple water arc streams spraying outward in a fan or arc pattern; lawn sprinkler head with outward water spray arcs
fa-sprinkler.functionalityId: represents a lawn or irrigation sprinkler in a gardening or landscaping context; controls or schedules a water sprinkler system
fa-sprinkler.intentId: control or schedule a lawn sprinkler or irrigation system; indicate water distribution in a gardening or smart home interface

fa-sprinkler-ceiling.appearanceId: a ceiling-mounted fire suppression sprinkler head silhouette viewed from below, with a small circular or cross-shaped deflector plate and downward water spray arcs; overhead ceiling sprinkler with a deflector plate and downward spray pattern
fa-sprinkler-ceiling.functionalityId: represents a ceiling-mounted fire suppression sprinkler; indicates a fire protection system, water activation, or building safety feature
fa-sprinkler-ceiling.intentId: indicate a ceiling fire sprinkler or suppression system; represent building fire safety equipment in a safety or smart building interface

fa-sprout.appearanceId: a small plant sprout silhouette with a short stem and two small rounded leaves unfurling upward from a soil line or seed; seedling outline with a slim stalk and two leaf buds
fa-sprout.functionalityId: represents a plant sprout, seedling, or new growth in a gardening or ecology context; indicates growth, sustainability, or a new beginning
fa-sprout.intentId: indicate plant growth, sustainability, or an eco-friendly theme; represent a seedling or new beginning in a gardening or environmental interface

fa-square.appearanceId: a plain filled or outlined square shape with four equal straight sides and right-angle corners; basic square geometric form with no interior markings
fa-square.functionalityId: represents a square shape, a checkbox, or a solid block element; selects, marks, or indicates a square item or region
fa-square.intentId: select or mark a square region or checkbox; indicate a square shape or block element in a design or form interface

fa-square-0.appearanceId: a square container with the digit 0 centered inside; square badge enclosing the numeral zero

fa-square-0.intentId: identify or label an item with the number zero in a square badge; use a zero-indexed square marker in a list or grid interface

fa-square-a-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked or access-restricted A-labeled item or section; indicates that the A-keyed content requires authentication or is protected

fa-square-binary.appearanceId: a square container with the digits 0 and 1 arranged inside to suggest binary code, such as a small grid or row of binary digits; square badge enclosing binary 0 and 1 digit characters
fa-square-binary.functionalityId: represents binary data, programming code, or a digital computing concept; indicates a binary value, toggle state, or low-level data context

fa-square-bolt.appearanceId: a square container with a lightning bolt or zigzag chevron shape centered inside; square badge enclosing a lightning bolt symbol
fa-square-bolt.functionalityId: represents a power action, electric feature, or quick-activation button in a square badge; indicates an energy, charge, or speed function

fa-square-c.appearanceId: a square container with the uppercase letter C centered inside; square badge enclosing the third letter of the alphabet

fa-square-code.functionalityId: represents a code snippet, developer feature, or programming element within a square badge; opens or indicates a code editing or viewing context

fa-square-d.appearanceId: a square container with the uppercase letter D centered inside; square badge enclosing the fourth letter of the alphabet
